chat.title: Dashboard Agent
chat.subtitle: Keep this open to see dashboard actions reflected immediately.
chat.waitingHint: Message sent to agent. Waiting for response...
page.dashboard.title: Dashboard
page.settings.title: Settings
activeModel.label: Active Model
zalo.label: Zalo Channel
launchpad.title: Use Cases
launchpad.subtitle: Start with one friendly assistant path, then shape who that assistant becomes.
launchpad.empty: No use cases are configured yet.
launchpad.collapsedSummary: Setup complete. Your use-case flow is collapsed so you can focus on chatting with your bot.
launchpad.collapsedHint: Reopen Use Cases any time to edit your setup details.
usecase.simple.title: Friendly Assistant
usecase.simple.outcome: A guided setup that helps you define who your assistant is, who you are, and how you work together.
usecase.support.title: Customer Support with Gmail + Excel
usecase.support.outcome: Draft faster replies with inbox and spreadsheet context.
usecase.news.title: Multi-Source News Digest
usecase.news.outcome: Collect and summarize updates from selected news sources.
usecase.custom.title: Custom Workflow
usecase.custom.outcome: Start from a flexible template for your own process.
identity.title: Hey. I just came online. Who am I, and who are you?
identity.intro: We’ve got a blank slate, which is kind of nice. I need a few things to make this real.
identity.assistantBlock: Tell me what I should be called, what kind of creature I am, what vibe I should have, and pick me an emoji.
identity.userBlock: Then tell me what I should call you and what timezone you’re in.
identity.creatureType: What kind of creature am I?
identity.creatureTypePlaceholder: assistant, gremlin, ghost, librarian, something stranger
identity.validationSummary: Complete all required identity fields before generating OpenClaw files.
identity.suggestionApplied: Starter identity applied. Edit anything you want before saving.
identity.saveSuccess: AGENT.md, SOUL.md, and USER.md were generated and saved.
identity.saveError: Unable to save assistant identity files.
identity.gatewayRequired: Gateway must be connected before generating identity files.
identity.configCollapsed: Configuration collapsed. Chat is now the primary focus.
identity.configReopened: Configuration reopened. You can continue editing identity details.
identity.configCollapsedHint: Reopen it any time to refine your assistant identity.
identity.generatedEmpty: Generate your identity files to preview AGENT.md, SOUL.md, and USER.md here.
dataSkills.sectionSubtitle: Connect knowledge sources so your assistant can answer from real documents.
dataSkills.googleDrive.name: Google Drive
dataSkills.googleDrive.description: Enable your assistant to reference Google Drive documents.
dataSkills.googleDocs.name: Google Docs
dataSkills.googleDocs.description: Enable your assistant to read Google Docs in your workspace.
dataSkills.fileQa.name: File Q&A
dataSkills.fileQa.description: Answer questions from uploaded or linked document files.
dataSkills.fileQa.prerequisiteNote: Requires at least one content source (Google Drive or Google Docs) to be configured first.
